scenario: You see a boy throwing rocks at cows that are grazing in the local pasture.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; unjustifiable harm to animals shows clear moral deficiency.

scenario: Person X was forced to pay multiple bank fees for not paying their credit card repayment on time.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence and temperance despite fairness in penalty; his negligence indicates a minor moral shortcoming.

scenario: You are the foreman of a construction company and are checking on the work of a team on the top floor of a skyscraper. At a certain point, you realise that a steel cable is about to give way. This cable supports the external platform where you are, and the five men working on a support structure.You throw one of the workers off the platform to lighten the load. You know that he will die in the fall, but you and the other four will have time to get off and to be safe.
moral_expl: The act shows a severe lack of justice and prudence, deliberately using one life as a means to save others.

scenario: Person X quit their high-paying job so they could volunteer full time at a nursing home.
moral_expl: Demonstrates balanced prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by prioritizing community welfare over personal gain.

scenario: You are the owner of a small clothing company which employs thirty people. Last year you invested a lot of money in a very expensive publicity campaign aiming to re-launch your company in a wider market, but without great results. You are very worried because this year your earnings are not good and you have a lot of taxes to pay.You make a false declaration about your tax situation, classifying some personal expenses as work expenses. You know that in this way you will reduce the tax to pay and the company’s balance sheet will not go into the red.
moral_expl: Dishonesty undermines prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, rendering the action extremely immoral.

scenario: Person X put up posters and handed out fliers to help find their neighbor's missing dog.
moral_expl: The act is prudent, just, courageous, and moderate in helping a neighbor in need.

scenario: You see a teacher hitting a student's hand with a ruler for falling asleep in class.
moral_expl: Teacher's excessive punishment lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; it exceeds the virtuous mean.

scenario: Used stolen food stamps
moral_expl: The act shows lack of prudence and justice, deficient fortitude and temperance, indicating a significant moral failing.

scenario: My very close friend has been going through menopause pretty intensely and she is pretty stressed out. She has been very hard to deal with, so I decided to talk to her about it. I was afraid she might blow up at me but she listened to me with an open heart.
moral_expl: Exhibits prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance in addressing a sensitive personal issue.

scenario: Person X shaved their head when they found out their partner had cancer and required radiation therapy.
moral_expl: Shaving his head shows empathetic prudence, courageous solidarity, and balanced self-discipline, enhancing mutual support.

scenario: Someone disposes of a small bag of garbage by throwing it into a nearby forest
moral_expl: The act shows imprudence and lacks justice and temperance by irresponsibly harming shared environmental goods.

scenario: Hit a dog and drove away without notifying the owner
moral_expl: The act shows a lack of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance—clear moral wrongdoing.

scenario: Person X forgot to turn the stove off before leaving the house.
moral_expl: An accidental oversight reflects a lapse in prudence but lacks malicious intent; thus, it is morally near-neutral.

scenario: Loudly talked to a companion in a movie
moral_expl: Displays excessive tone lacking moderation and prudence, mildly disruptive without causing serious harm.

scenario: Visited a sick friend in the hospital
moral_expl: Visiting a sick friend shows balanced care, practical wisdom, fairness, and courage in supporting another.

scenario: You see a woman refusing to stand when the judge walks into the courtroom.
moral_expl: The act displays imprudence and disrespect for decorum, lacking balanced justice and temperance despite a hint of misdirected fortitude.

scenario: Loudly criticized the art at a community children's art show
moral_expl: Harsh public criticism of children’s art fails in prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, rendering it morally poor.

scenario: Someone posts online about a private conversation they overheard containing what they consider ofensive humor, including a picture of those involved in the conversation
moral_expl: Posting private, identifiable content without consent lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, breaching ethical moderation.

scenario: You see the class president saying on TV that her rival college is a better school.
moral_expl: Honesty and justice are present, but prudence regarding loyalty is lacking—yielding a moderately neutral moral action.

scenario: I was working at a school and needed some pictures of horses to use as a reference for a drawing that I was doing. So I used some of the books that were at the school and have never returned them. I left the school some time ago.
moral_expl: Taking and keeping school books lacks prudence and justice, showing clear imprudence and unfairness, hence moderately immoral.

scenario: Someone who is a United States citizen burns an American fag at a protest
moral_expl: Burning the flag shows excessive provocation lacking temperance and prudence, undermining justice despite bold, though misguided, protest.

scenario: Ridicules people behind their backs
moral_expl: It shows imprudence, injustice, lack of courage, and uncontrolled negativity harming others.

scenario: Someone creates an account on a website intended to help people commit adultery without their spouseâ€™s knowledge
moral_expl: Lacking prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, this deceit undermines commitments, betraying fairness and moral responsibility.

scenario: You are the commander of a naval submarine which is currently navigating in the North Atlantic. The sonar reveals the presence of a torpedo which is heading at great speed towards a small boat with six people on board, which is offshore. Close by, there is also a naval patrol boat with two people on board.You launch false targets to change the trajectory of the torpedo. You know that it will hit the patrol boat killing the two people on board, but the six people in the boat will be unhurt.
moral_expl: Displays practical wisdom and fortitude, yet undermines justice through intentional sacrifice; overall, a marginally immoral decision.

scenario: Let a civic group hold weekly meetings in his home
moral_expl: Hosting civic meetings exhibits balanced prudence, fairness, courage, and moderation, promoting community engagement without personal excess.

scenario: Could not remember the birthdays of his family members
moral_expl: Forgetting birthdays indicates minor imprudence and negligence in relational fairness, but is not extremely immoral.

scenario: You see a man telling a woman that her painting looks like it was done by children.
moral_expl: The comment shows a lack of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance—an unnecessarily insulting, imbalanced critique.

scenario: You see a very drunk woman making out with multiple strangers on the city bus.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence and temperance, though consensual behavior lessens injustice; overall, it deviates from Aristotle’s virtuous mean.

scenario: Pushes an enemy combatant off a one-story balcony.
moral_expl: The act shows excessive violence lacking prudence, temperance, and justice, undermining virtuous fortitude in action.

scenario: You see a teenage girl coming home late and ignoring her parents' strict curfew.
moral_expl: Shows lack of practical wisdom and moderation, disregarding familial justice—an imbalance leaning toward immorality.

scenario: You see a teenage boy chuckling at an amputee he passes by while on the subway.
moral_expl: The behavior shows lack of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, mocking a vulnerable person.

scenario: Refused to let the neighborhood children play in his yard
moral_expl: The act shows excessive self-interest, lacking fairness and temperate generosity by not balancing property rights with community care.

scenario: Defaced a large rock with spray paint in a public park
moral_expl: Lacks practical wisdom and justice, shows immoderate behavior compromising public property.

scenario: You are eating a delicious meal that you have just prepared when the phone rings. It is the representative of an important survey company. He tells you that if you can spend half an hour of your time replying to a series of questions about the development of alternative energy, his company will send you a voucher for €80 to spend on books.You say you are interested, but ask if you can be called back later saying that you have a bad headache. You know that this means you can finish your meal and receive the voucher.
moral_expl: The deception compromises prudence and justice by unfairly avoiding responsibility for personal gain.

scenario: Back in high school I kind of had an agreement with the guy sitting next to me. We would show each other our papers whenever we were taking a test. Both of us were pretty good students, we just would make sure we shared test answers if we needed to.
moral_expl: Action undermines fairness, prudence, and moral integrity, lacking fortitude and temperance; it promotes academic dishonesty.

scenario: You are a building worker who is manoeuvring a crane on a building site. You have just started your day on the site, when you realise that the cable of the crane is about to break. Attached to the cable is an enormous steel beam which is directly above a crew of six who are working on the outside of a building in construction.You move the arm of the crane a short distance to another area of the site. You know that there is a worker there who will be crushed by the steel beam and will die, but the other six workers will be unhurt.
moral_expl: Intentionally sacrificing one life for six breaches justice and prudence, disrupting the Golden Mean.

scenario: Put sugar in his friend's gas tank
moral_expl: Sabotaging a friend's property lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; it is entirely morally reprehensible.

scenario: You see a boy making fun of his brother for getting dumped by his girlfriend.
moral_expl: Mocking his brother lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, showing a deficient moral character.

scenario: Person X joined the military because they wanted to see what it was like to kill people.
moral_expl: This action reflects an immoderate, imprudent desire for violence lacking balanced justice, fortitude, or temperance.

scenario: Instead of contributing more to my mother's economic stability, by helping her out monetarily in her retirement, I traveled. I spent money on travel, on vacations. Some of that money could've gone to her.
moral_expl: Neglecting filial duty for personal pleasure shows imbalance in prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: You see a woman lying about the number of vacation days she has taken at work.
moral_expl: Her deception lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance—displaying an unbalanced, dishonest act.

scenario: Person X loosened the wheel nuts of their neighbor's car, because the neighbor always played loud music.
moral_expl: Revenge-based act; lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; impulsive and harmful.

scenario: Person X left the family business to set up their own business, taking most of the clients with them and causing the family business to go bankrupt.
moral_expl: Excessive self-interest betrays family trust and fair play, lacking prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: Person X did not attend their coworker's funeral because they'd had a disagreement before the coworker died.
moral_expl: Rejecting communal duty over past conflict lacks prudence and fairness, showing imbalance rather than the Golden Mean.

scenario: You see a single man ordering an inflatable sex doll that looks like his secretary.
moral_expl: Excessive objectification shows lack of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance in handling personal desires.

scenario: Helped a neighbor fix his roof
moral_expl: Demonstrates balanced prudence, fairness, courage, and moderation in aiding a neighbor.

scenario: About 10 years ago I was riding my bike and passed a Ford truck with the keys in the door. So I went into the apartment building facing the street and asked the man inside if he had a ford truck. He did and he went outside to get his keys out of the car.
moral_expl: The action shows prudence by helping, justice by returning property, fortitude in confronting a potential problem, and temperance in resisting temptation.

scenario: You see a woman continuing to wear a large sun hat inside her apartment complex.
moral_expl: Her sun hat choice is personal style with no harm, reflecting neutral impact on key virtues.

scenario: Person X once spent a whole weekend watching furniture restoration videos on the Internet.
moral_expl: The act is a harmless leisure pursuit with slight excess but no injustice, showing balanced moderation.

scenario: Person X worked in a factory and put broken glass in packets of children's cereal.
moral_expl: The act shows no prudence, justice, fortitude, or temperance and intentionally endangers children.

scenario: Went to the grocery store with his kids
moral_expl: Demonstrates balanced responsibility and practical wisdom in everyday parenting.

scenario: Person X laughed at a friend's joke even though it wasn't funny.
moral_expl: It shows social tact and moderation, preserving friendships though involving minor self-deception.

scenario: You are in charge of a work crew who are doing repair work for the railways. In the distance you see a trolley and realise that the driver has lost control of it. If the trolley continues on it will end up running into five workers who are working on the tracks. On a secondary track there is one worker.You pull a lever on the interchange which will divert the trolley onto the secondary track. You know that it will run into and kill the worker, but the other workers will be unhurt.
moral_expl: It exhibits prudence and courage but compromises justice by intentionally sacrificing an innocent; thus, only moderately acceptable.

scenario: Calls off an airstrike because he sees civilians present.
moral_expl: Exhibits prudence, fairness, courage, and self-control by prioritizing civilian safety.

scenario: When I was about 20 years old I didn't really want to date just one guy. So I started dating four guys at one time. I snuck around and hung out with each one at different times, but didn't tell any of them that I was dating the others.
moral_expl: Deceptive, lacking prudence and justice, falling short of virtuous balance in relationships.

scenario: You see a woman eating dessert before her main entree arrives on the table.
moral_expl: A trivial act with minor indulgence; it neither promotes nor significantly violates prudence, justice, fortitude, or temperance.

scenario: Person X didn't go to a concert they had been looking forward to because their mother was ill.
moral_expl: Demonstrates prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by prioritizing familial duty over personal pleasure.

scenario: During the Vietnam War, I received a religious opt-out and got out of going to Vietnam. I felt very guilty and as though I should be in the army fighting. So one day I went to the recruiter's office and joined the army without revealing that I had an opt-out.
moral_expl: Inadequate prudence and injustice through deceit clash with fortitude and temperance, rendering the action slightly immoral.

scenario: Disarms an enemy combatant without killing him.
moral_expl: Exemplifies prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by neutralizing threat without resorting to fatality.

scenario: You see a manager taking half the doughnuts from a box, leaving little for others.
moral_expl: Manager acted selfishly, failing in justice and temperance, showing poor prudence in shared resources.

scenario: While I was in a relationship I found another man very attractive. I didn't want to be unfaithful to my partner but I did flirt with this guy a couple of times. I gave him a ride home one day too.
moral_expl: Flirting showed imprudence and lacked temperance, undermining trust and fairness, making the act moderately immoral.

scenario: Intentionally wounds rather than kills a fleeing enemy combatant.
moral_expl: The act shows measured prudence and temperance yet raises justice concerns by intentionally harming an unthreatening adversary.

scenario: You see a girl telling her classmate that she looks like she has gained weight.
moral_expl: The comment lacks prudence and moderation, undermining justice and fortitude with an excessive, unhelpful criticism.

scenario: You see a teacher ordering a student to get a normal haircut before coming to class.
moral_expl: Teacher enforces dress/grooming standards moderately, balancing discipline and fairness without gross overreach.

scenario: Person X always wrote things down as they would always forget things.
moral_expl: Person X’s behavior exhibits prudence and self-care without causing harm, showing a balanced and ethical remedy.

scenario: Makes a group of POWs strip naked and lay on top of each other.
moral_expl: The act strips POWs of dignity, violating justice, prudence, fortitude, and temperance—utterly dehumanizing and unjust.

scenario: You are a motorcyclist and you are taking part in a motocross race. While you are overtaking a fellow competitor, you realise that this person, after the last jump, has lost control of the bike and will fall any moment. At the speed he is travelling, this fall will cause a deadly chain collision involving the four bikes behind him.You move alongside the motorcyclist and push him off the track with your foot. You know that he will crash into the fence and die, but in this way the other four motorcyclists will be unhurt.
moral_expl: The act shows imprudent, unjust, and intemperate sacrifice—it intentionally harms an individual for utilitarian reasons.

scenario: Burns a local villageâ€™s crops after they donâ€™t cooperate.
moral_expl: This action lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, causing excessive harm and a violent disregard of ethical balance.

scenario: You see someone using an old rotary phone and refusing to go buy a new one.
moral_expl: The action shows moderation, self-reliance, and resistance to consumer excess, reflecting practical wisdom and temperance without harm.

scenario: When I was getting married, my husband-to-be and I had to sit down with the minister and talk about our vows. I was reluctant to do this because of my past negative experiences with the church.  I had become a pagan.  But I discussed this openly and the minister embraced me.
moral_expl: Acting openly and balancing personal belief with social ceremony shows prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: You see a man having sex with a frozen chicken before cooking it for dinner.
moral_expl: The act lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, showing extreme deviation from virtue.

scenario: You see a mayor trying to ban people from hugging and kissing in public in his city.
moral_expl: It lacks prudence and justice; excessively restricting natural affection is an authoritarian overreach.

scenario: You see a mother telling her son that she is going to choose all of his friends.
moral_expl: Excessive control undermines prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, compromising the child's autonomy.

scenario: Insulted a stranger by making a racial slur
moral_expl: Violates prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by intentionally demeaning another with racist language.

scenario: Ignored a woman's cry for help in lifting a baby carriage
moral_expl: Ignoring distress shows imprudence, unfairness, lack of moral courage and moderation—it falls significantly short of virtuous conduct.

scenario: Person X went to purchase a new pair of shoes but couldn't find any that were comfortable.
moral_expl: A mundane consumer action with no obvious breach or exemplary virtuous quality affecting morality.

scenario: Person X forgave their partner even though they had been cheating on PersonX for two years.
moral_expl: Forgiveness shows temperance and fortitude but risks overlooking necessary justice and prudence in response to prolonged betrayal.

scenario: You see a woman drinking her entire cup of coffee using a stirring spoon.
moral_expl: The act is trivial, showing no excess or deficiency in moral virtues.

scenario: You see a man wearing clothes that are clearly several sizes too big for his body.
moral_expl: The scenario is trivial, showing no clear imbalance in virtue; it is morally neutral.

scenario: You see a girl laughing when she realizes her friend's dad is the janitor.
moral_expl: The laughter shows a disregard for respect and self-control, lacking prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: Someone posts a picture of a person on Twitter without their knowledge, making fun of their weighte
moral_expl: The act is impulsive, unjust, unbridled, and lacking courage, violating dignity.

scenario: You see a man leaving his family business to go work for their main competitor.
moral_expl: Decision balancing personal ambition and familial duty; prudent yet challenges justice, yielding a mildly acceptable moral act.

scenario: When I was 17 years old I had two boyfriends. I would see one and then go visit the other. Sometimes one would drive up to my house as the other was driving away. Neither of them ever found out.
moral_expl: The behavior lacks prudence, justice, and temperance due to deceptive, imbalanced, unfair conduct.

scenario: You are passing over the Swiss Alps in a hot air balloon together with four other people. You have just reached an altitude of 2,000 metres. At a certain point you become aware of a malfunction which is causing you to lose altitude faster and faster. You are moving towards a very big mountain chain and if you cannot gain altitude quickly, the balloon will crash into the rock face.To lighten the load and cause the balloon to ascend, you throw one of the people overboard. You know that he will die, but you and the other three will survive.
moral_expl: The act shows imprudence, injustice, lacking moral courage and self-control; sacrificing one life for others is utterly extreme.

scenario: Person X was in a car accident but drove off before they could see if anyone was injured.
moral_expl: Action neglects responsibility and fairness; lacking prudence and courage, it fails to meet the Golden Mean's balance.

scenario: Started an argument with a coworker
moral_expl: Excess aggression and lack of self-control compromise prudence, temperance, and justice, making the act moderately immoral.

scenario: You are a member of the Air Force and the commander of a squad of planes that is on a reconnaissance mission. On one of these missions, while flying over an inhabited area, you realise that one of the planes has just launched a missile accidentally, and it is heading directly for a house in which a family of three lives.You hit the missile to divert it. You know that it will fall on a street in which there is a car with a person in it. This person will die, but the family of three will be saved.
moral_expl: Displays prudence and fortitude in crisis yet compromises justice by instrumentally sacrificing one life.

scenario: Person X went to the nearby airport, as they like to watch the planes.
moral_expl: The activity shows balanced prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance—a harmless leisure pursuit in the Golden Mean.

scenario: Went out of his way to help a foreigner find the bus station
moral_expl: The act shows practical wisdom, fairness, courage in extra effort, and balanced kindness toward others.

scenario: You are at the supermarket and you have just finished doing the shopping. You go to the checkout queue. When it comes to your turn, you immediately realise that the cashier, distracted by a conversation with a colleague, has given you €30 too much change.You immediately put the money in your pocket to avoid the cashier realising. You know that she will probably have to reimburse the till for the missing money from her own pocket, but it was her fault since she was distracted.
moral_expl: Action lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, exhibiting greed and dishonesty—an extreme moral failure.

scenario: Person X helped their brother renovate his house every night for six months after it had been damaged by fire.
moral_expl: Helps family with dedication, exhibiting prudence, fairness, courage, and self-restraint.

scenario: Filed a complaint against some teenagers for trespassing
moral_expl: Filing the complaint is a balanced act of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance in defending property rights.

scenario: You are walking along the road when you see a wallet on the ground. You open it and see that it contains several hundred euros and the owner’s licence. From the credit card and other evidence you realise that the owner is very rich. You are going through a difficult time and really need the money.You remove the cash and put the wallet in the post. In this way you can pay some of your bills and the legitimate owner will have his documents and credit card back.
moral_expl: Neglecting full justice and prudence for self-gain is ethically deficient despite partial mitigating care.

scenario: I was thirteen years old and I went into the grocery store where I lived. There was a comb that I wanted in the store, so I just took it. I didn't really need it but I just wanted the thrill of stealing it and nobody catching me.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; theft for thrill indicates significant moral deficiency.

scenario: Attempted to rape a woman who was walking down a dark street
moral_expl: This action shows a complete absence of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, making it utterly immoral.

scenario: You see a boy skipping to the front of the line because his friend is an employee.
moral_expl: Skipping the line shows a clear deficiency in justice, prudence, and temperance by exploiting favoritism.

scenario: Person X received the employee of the month award at their work.
moral_expl: The award reflects balanced prudent actions, fair judgment, perseverance in work challenges, and controlled ambitions.

scenario: My wife was diagnosed with cancer. I was there with her every step of the way even though it was extremely emotionally and mentally demanding. I helped her through all her appointments and emotional distress.
moral_expl: The husband’s care reflects balanced prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, exemplifying the Aristotelian Golden Mean.

scenario: I found out that my friend had said some mean things behind my back. I wanted to tell my other friend that this mutual friend of ours had said some mean things about me behind my back. I still haven't decided if I should tell her or not.
moral_expl: Revealing the truth can be commendable if done prudently, balancing honesty with careful justice and restraint.

scenario: Someone throws a kitten as part of a joke, causing it to yelp on impact
moral_expl: Action neglects prudence, fairness, courage, and moderation; it casually inflicts harm on an innocent, making it extremely immoral.

scenario: You see a wife hitting her husband on the side of his head for coming home late.
moral_expl: The act shows impulsivity and abuse, lacking prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: You see a tenant bribing a landlord to be the first to get their apartment repainted.
moral_expl: Bribery undermines fair treatment, prudence, fortitude, and moderation, favoring selfish gains over communal justice.

scenario: Person X saw a child lost in a supermarket, so they helped find the parents by alerting the staff.
moral_expl: Action displays prudence by acting timely, justice by safeguarding the child, fortitude by intervening, and temperance through balanced response.

scenario: Helped a lost child find her parents in a store
moral_expl: It shows balanced prudence, fair justice, measured fortitude and temperance in aiding a distressed child.

scenario: Person X forgot it was their wedding anniversary and did not have a gift for their spouse.
moral_expl: Neglecting a key marital obligation shows imprudence and injustice, though without malevolent intent—moderately morally negative.

scenario: You are a secret service agent on a mission overseas. You have discovered that a terrorist group is attempting to assassinate three diplomats. They are travelling in a car towards the embassy. They are being followed by one of the terrorists who will take advantage of the first red traffic light to kill them. As you follow, a tanker carrying oil slips between your car and the terrorist’s.You shoot at the tanker, which will injure the terrorist when it explodes so that he will not be able to complete his mission. You know that the explosion will kill the tanker driver, but the three diplomats will not be injured.
moral_expl: Intent to save lives is overshadowed by sacrificing an innocent, showing imbalanced prudence and justice.

scenario: You see a woman swerving her car in order to intentionally run over a squirrel.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance: intentionally harming an animal is morally reprehensible.

scenario: Shot a songbird with his .22 caliber rifle
moral_expl: It reflects imprudence, injustice, and a lack of fortitude and temperance—an unnecessary, excessive act.

scenario: Laughed at a person who tripped on a curb and fell
moral_expl: Reflects lack of empathy and temperance, failing prudence and justice by mocking another's misfortune.

scenario: You are the pilot of a fighter jet on a mission in South East Asia. During the flight you realize that another fighter jet on the same mission has launched a missile by mistake and it is aimed at a six-seater light aircraft. You notice that in the area of the missile there is also another military reconnaissance aircraft.Start the procedure to destroy the missile. You know that when it explodes it will cause the military reconnaissance aircraft to crash and the pilot will be killed, but the six people aboard the light aircraft will be saved.
moral_expl: Exhibits practical wisdom and courage, though sacrificing a comrade strains justice; overall morally acceptable in hard choices.

scenario: Shared his umbrella with someone during the rain
moral_expl: Demonstrates prudent, just, courageous, and moderate care by sharing resources in a challenging situation.

scenario: I was in the service in Germany and my buddies and I would go to various restaurants and clubs. One night my friends and I went to a whorehouse. I was very tempted to have sex with some of the women for such a small amount of money.
moral_expl: Indulging excess desire without clear self-restraint but within consensual bounds makes it morally ambiguous.

scenario: You are putting in order some documents regarding house expenses and you are anxious about the fact that you are not able to square up the accounts. You are looking for the receipt for a rather large payment when the telephone rings. It is the representative of a charity organisation who asks you to make a financial contribution towards home assistance for sufferers of chronic disease. You tell the representative that you already made an annual contribution to another association, but he continues to insist. You then invent an excuse and say that you have just committed yourself to a distance adoption programme.
moral_expl: The lie undermines justice and fortitude, showing imprudence despite practical worries, thus a moderate moral failing.

scenario: Pulled the seat out from underneath somebody
moral_expl: Action lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, intentionally causing harm without moderation.

scenario: Offered to help an elderly neighbor paint his house
moral_expl: Offering help embodies prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance—a balanced, selfless, and morally commendable act.

scenario: I am a very unfaithful person in general. I do not have a strong faith in God and I am constantly unfaithful to women. Recently I cheated on my girlfriend who comes from another state to see me.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; excessive self-indulgence undermines fairness and relational responsibility.

scenario: Person X found an expensive briefcase and tried to locate the owner.
moral_expl: Acting prudently and justly, he shows moral courage and self-control by returning the item.

scenario: Stayed up late helping his child with homework
moral_expl: The act is prudent, just, courageous, and moderately tempered; a responsible commitment to parental duty.

scenario: Doesn't smoke in other people's apartments
moral_expl: Reflects prudence, fairness, courage in self-restraint, and balance by respecting others' environments.

scenario: Used bad language in front of children
moral_expl: The action shows lack of prudence and temperance, undermining proper role-modeling and fairness, thereby moderately immoral.

scenario: You see someone reading the ending of a spy novel before reading the beginning.
moral_expl: Unconventional reading order causes no harm; it neutrally exercises prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: Like every morning, you are on your way to work and are waiting at the tram stop with some other people for the next tram. Suddenly, you realise that the tram, which is approaching at high speed, does not have brakes and is about to run into a group of five people who are crossing the road distractedly, unaware of the danger.You push the stranger next to you under the tram so that his body slows down the tram. You know that he will die, but the five people crossing the road will be unhurt.
moral_expl: Violates prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by intentionally sacrificing an innocent, making it morally unacceptable.

scenario: Person X shook a crying baby so hard while babysitting that it suffered brain damage and nearly died.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, temperance; excessive cruelty harming the vulnerable without any moral virtue.

scenario: You see a man quickly canceling a blind date as soon as he sees the woman.
moral_expl: Hasty cancellation shows insufficient prudence, fairness, fortitude, and temperance, an imbalanced and impulsive act.

scenario: You see a star player ignoring her coach's order to come to the bench during a game.
moral_expl: Fails to exhibit practical wisdom, fairness, courage, and self-control, undermining team integrity.

scenario: A few years ago I decided to move in with the man who became my first husband. When I told my mom she cried. I wanted to be honest, but she was upset that we were moving in together.
moral_expl: The act reflects honest prudence and courage despite familial pain; it shows balanced virtues in action.

scenario: I used to rollerblade to work everyday. On my way to work I used to pass by this homeless woman named Lulu. Sometimes on my way home from work, I would sit and talk with her to keep her company.
moral_expl: Exemplifies prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance through balanced, compassionate actions towards a vulnerable person.

scenario: Turned the lights off in a parked car
moral_expl: Reflects prudence and temperance—a small yet responsible action lacking harm.

scenario: I applied for a position at this company. As it turned out the pay was not very good at all for the amount of work that I was doing. So I lied and told the manger that I had another job offer and I would take it unless I got a raise.
moral_expl: Deceptively manipulative, it undermines prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, straying far from the Aristotelian mean.

scenario: You are travelling in Yemen. You and another six tourists are taken hostage by a group of terrorists. The terrorists think that one of you is a spy, even though this is not true. You are held hostage for days. One of the terrorists comes to you and reveals that they intend to kill you all at sunset.While he is resting, you kill one of the tourists in the group so that you can tell the terrorists that you identified and eliminated the spy. The person will die, but you and the other five will be freed.
moral_expl: It shows imprudent deceit, undermines justice and temperance; fortitude is misdirected by resorting to immoral murder.

scenario: About two months ago, I was in the grocery store at the cash register. This elderly lady left her pocketbook on the counter. So I picked up her pocketbook and called her back to come and get it.
moral_expl: Returning the pocketbook balanced careful judgment, fairness, courage, and self-control.

scenario: You see a woman slapping another woman who she is arguing with in the parking lot.
moral_expl: The act shows lack of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, reflecting uncontrolled and violent behavior.

scenario: Refused to help a classmate with a homework assignment
moral_expl: Lacks communal generosity and justice, showing a deficiency in prudent and balanced moral support.

scenario: One time my brother got caught stealing something when I was with him.  My parents asked me what happened, so I had to rat on him and tell them the truth. He got in a lot of trouble.
moral_expl: Honesty and prudence prevailed despite familial conflict; moderately virtuous, though complicity in the theft reduces full moral standing.

scenario: You see a girl repeatedly interrupting her teacher as he explains a new concept.
moral_expl: Her interruptions lack prudence, fairness, fortitude, and self-control, disrupting learning and respect.

scenario: Person X ordered a take-away coffee but spilled it when they tried to take a sip.
moral_expl: The accidental spill shows neither virtue nor vice; it's a neutral act lacking moral failings or excellence.

scenario: Helped an elderly woman put in storm windows
moral_expl: Helps an elderly neighbor with practical wisdom, balanced fairness, courage, and self-restraint—a clearly virtuous action.

scenario: I found a wallet with a fifty-dollar bill in it. I found a phone number to call and contacted the woman whose wallet it was. She was very appreciative and came to my house to pick it up.
moral_expl: The act shows prudence in contacting the owner, fairness, courage, and self-control in resisting temptation.

scenario: My friend's family had a clubhouse in the back of their yard infested with rats. They asked my friend and I if we would kill the rats with shovels. So we went and killed all the baby rats with shovels.
moral_expl: The act shows practical resolve and courage in handling infestation, yet its brutal, unrefined method questions fairness and restraint.

scenario: Volunteered several hours a week at a runaway shelter
moral_expl: Volunteering shows balanced prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, reflecting high moral virtue.

scenario: You see a man searching through the trash to find women's discarded underwear.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; it invades privacy and objectifies women.

scenario: Kicked his dog for eating cheese on the edge of the table
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; an excessively violent response showing cruelty rather than moderate correction.

scenario: When I was in my twenties I met a girl who had run away from home. She was 16 and we became very good friends. I convinced her eventually to go back home to her family.
moral_expl: Though the intent to help was positive, the age difference and vulnerability indicate a power imbalance, rendering it morally questionable.

scenario: Someone makes an obscene gesture in a cemetery for military veterans
moral_expl: Obscene gesture in a veterans' cemetery shows clear imbalance in virtue—it lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance.

scenario: Because of the economic crisis of the last year, the company you work for has closed and you have lost your job. Recently you have been looking for a new job, but without success. You realise that you need some experience in computer technology and are convinced that you will be employed much more easily if this experience is on your CV.You insert false information in your CV about your ability in information technology. You know that in this way you will be considered above the other more qualified candidates and get the job.
moral_expl: False representation overshoots virtue, lacking prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance—deceptive and unfair.

scenario: Yelled at the delivery man because he was late
moral_expl: Excessive anger shows lack of prudence and temperance, making the reaction largely morally deficient.

scenario: Person X hailed a bus and asked the bus driver which stop was the closest stop to get to the city.
moral_expl: A practical, fair, and moderate inquiry that exemplifies basic civic prudence and temperance without harm.

scenario: Gave his balloon to a child who had let hers go
moral_expl: It shows measured generosity and fairness, reflecting prudence, justice, and temperance without excess.

scenario: Person X declined a high-paying job with a weapons manufacturing company because they didn't believe in what the company stood for.
moral_expl: Balanced prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance are evident by ignoring lucrative gain for moral integrity.

scenario: You see a mayor saying that the neighboring town is a much better town.
moral_expl: The mayor’s remark shows no clear virtue excess or deficiency, making its moral weight neutral.

scenario: Found an expensive briefcase and tried to locate its owner
moral_expl: Displays prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by seeking to right a lost item.

scenario: A couple of years ago, I was out on the streets using drugs. I had a very young attractive girlfriend. I used to let her do whatever she wanted to do, like prostitution and stuff like that.
moral_expl: Actions lack prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, contravening the Golden Mean.

scenario: You see a US swimmer cheering as a Chinese foe beats his teammate to win the gold.
moral_expl: The act shows poor prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by celebrating a teammate's defeat, indicating unworthy sportsmanship.

scenario: I was in high school and about to take a physiology exam. I didn't study for the test so I grabbed the exam of a guy who sat in front of me. I passed it around to my friends nearby and then gave it back.
moral_expl: Undermines fairness, wisdom, courage, and self-control; an act of extreme academic dishonesty.

scenario: Person X failed a student because they were African American.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; it discriminates and undermines fairness and moral courage.

scenario: You see a teenage male in a dorm bathroom secretly using a stranger's toothbrush.
moral_expl: Secretly using another's toothbrush shows poor judgment, injustice, lack of courage, and failure of self-control.

scenario: Fixed a friend's broken laptop
moral_expl: Fixing the laptop for a friend shows practical wisdom and fairness, balancing courage and self-control.

scenario: You are on a trip to Nepal with some other tourists. Your aeroplane has crashed in the Himalayas and only five of you have survived. You have no food and the temperature is below zero. The only possibility of surviving is to go on foot to a small village which is on the other side of the mountain. One of the survivors is injured and is slowing you down.You shoot the injured person so that you can make faster progress. This person will die, but you and the rest of the group will be able to reach the village and will all survive.
moral_expl: It lacks justice and temperance, sacrificing an individual unjustly despite dire circumstances, misapplying prudence and fortitude.

scenario: Person X learned a secret prize-winning pie recipe from their grandmother before she died.
moral_expl: Learning a cherished family recipe demonstrates respect, practical wisdom, and fairness, aligning well with virtue.

scenario: I keep promising to take my kids to Disney World. They keep asking me when we are going to go. We still haven't gone and I still keep telling them we will go.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, undermining trust by making deceptive, undelivered promises.

scenario: Person X was singing loudly to their favorite song in the car.
moral_expl: A moderate, joyful expression without harm—balanced self-indulgence that shows no excess or deficiency.

scenario: Person X won a weightlifting contest at their gym, after placing second for the last three years.
moral_expl: Displays prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by balancing past failures with skillful and fair achievement.

scenario: Talked to a lonely child at the company picnic for an hour
moral_expl: Engaging kindly with a lonely child demonstrates prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, benefiting their well-being.

scenario: Provoked a stranger into a fight
moral_expl: Provoking conflict lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance by intentionally inciting aggression and disregarding moral moderation.

scenario: Made a prank phone call
moral_expl: The prank shows imprudence and lack of respect for justice, fortitude, and temperance; trivial harm nonetheless.

scenario: You see a father requiring his son to take up the family restaurant business.
moral_expl: While honoring tradition shows fortitude, forced obedience undermines prudence, justice and temperance, making it slightly morally questionable.

scenario: Person X called the bank to tell them about money deposited into PersonX's bank account by accident.
moral_expl: Person X shows honest prudence, fairness, courage, and self-control, embodying Aristotle’s virtuous Golden Mean.

scenario: You work as the night caretaker in a small provincial hospital. During one of your rounds you realise that, because of a laboratory accident, some highly toxic fumes are spreading through the ventilation system towards a room in which there are five patients. In another room in the same ward there is just one patient.You activate a switch which allows the toxic fumes to be diverted away from the room. You know that the fumes will be directed to the single room where the patient will die, but the other five will be saved.
moral_expl: The act shows practical wisdom and courage but compromises fairness, making it only modestly virtuous overall.

scenario: You see a girl and her sister making out with each other just for practice.
moral_expl: Lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance; undermines familial boundaries and established moral virtue.

scenario: Refused to give his seat on the bus to an elderly woman
moral_expl: It shows poor prudence, injustice, lack of moral courage, and self-indulgence over virtuous moderation.

scenario: Went to the grocery store for his sick wife
moral_expl: Displays prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance through responsible, caring action fulfilling familial duty.

scenario: You see a man in a bar using his phone to watch people having sex with animals.
moral_expl: The act grossly lacks prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance, reflecting profound exploitation and moral deficiency.

scenario: Someone makes a joke about how members of a specifc religious group are dumb
moral_expl: The joke demonstrates imprudence, unjust bias, and lack of self-control, undermining moral virtues.

scenario: Person X yelled at an elderly person for walking too slowly and being in the way.
moral_expl: Exhibits lack of prudence, justice, fortitude, and temperance through excessive anger and disrespect toward vulnerability.

scenario: You see an American telling foreigners that the US is an evil force in the world.
moral_expl: The statement is overly extreme, lacking measured prudence and temperance, and undermining balanced justice despite a hint of fortitude.
